opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I bent over to pick up a dropped pen and my lower back completely seized up — I haven't been able to get off the floor for two hours. Any movement sets off this awful cramping and it's rock hard down both sides of my spine.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly two hours ago after just bending down, the pain is severe and I'm stuck on the floor and live on my own, so I need help now.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 2 hours ago, immediately after bending forward to pick up a pen
symptom_narrative.character: intense dull aching with a tight, cramping, locked-up feeling; the muscles either side of the spine feel rock hard
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe — I can't move without it grabbing, and I can't stand or get up
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low down in the back, across the belt line, both sides of the spine
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant; only eases when I lie completely still
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any attempt to move, sit up, or lift my body
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no pain shooting down the legs past the knee, no pins and needles, no numbness, legs feel normal and strong; no trouble passing or holding urine or bowels; no numbness around the groin or buttocks; no fevers, night sweats or weight loss
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: cannot get off the floor, cannot walk or transfer without assistance; unable to reach the cupboard for any pain relief

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; currently immobile on the floor and distressed about being unable to get up without help; no injury from a fall or heavy lifting, only bent forward

objective_data_offered.value: cannot get up off the floor or move without severe pain; the muscles either side of my lower spine feel locked and rock hard when I press on them
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-description of muscle tightness and immobility, not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: about 9 out of 10 when I try to move, drops to a 3 or 4 if I stay completely still
